candidate_problem_record.subject: physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: Four identical coherent monochromatic wave sources A, B, C, D, as shown in Fig. 4.2 produce waves of the same wavelength $\lambda$. Two receivers $R_{1}$ and $R_{2}$ are at great (but equal) distances from $B$. Which receiver, if any, picks up the greater signal if source $B$ is turned off?
candidate_problem_record.raw_answer_text: Both receivers pick up signals of the same intensity
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集保留多解潜力评估，但不默认强推多解 agent。
